## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and Noboringdesign for design services](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Noboringdesign offers tiered design services (Ignite, Elevate, Amplify) with pricing from $5.5k-$10.5k/quarter](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [GrowthX has existing collaboration agreement, but specifics need clarification](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [GrowthX's immediate needs: high-volume, high-quality content/imagery for client deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Potential for brand refresh work, pending internal alignment at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Topics

### Noboringdesign Services Overview

  - [Full-stack brand identity work (12 weeks avg)](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Brand sprints (faster, fewer deliverables)](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Tiered retainer services:](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Ignite: PM, Creative Director, Designer](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
      - [Elevate: Adds 2nd specialty seat (e.g., web dev, motion)](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Amplify: Up to 3 concurrent projects](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [In-house capabilities: design, Webflow development, motion, illustration](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Dedicated Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Team includes PM, designer, creative director, QC specialists](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - 48-hour turnaround for \<3 ads (longer for complex projects)
  - [Experience with HubSpot, Airtable; limited CMS integration exp](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### AI Stance and Usage

  - [Emphasize human factor for creativity/originality](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Use AI as complement (e.g., Midjourney for specific image requests)](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Exploring AI for ad resizing to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)

### GrowthX Needs and Potential Collaboration

  - [Immediate: High-volume content (50k+ words, imagery, landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Varying client brand guideline situations](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Potential brand refresh work (pending internal alignment)](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Explore pilot project to test collaboration fit](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to discuss internally and match Noboringdesign offerings with GrowthX needs](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Explore potential pilot project](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Renato to follow up with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [Bea to determine potential costs based on defined project scope](https://fathom.video/share/27CkqKhqT54F8GX2RRyB81tqUzPxJBAk?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
